Tokyo Hotel Booking Confirmation: Reservation confirmed at the Shinjuku Granbell Hotel, Tokyo, for check-in April 3, 2024, and check-out April 8, 2024 (5 nights). Room type: Superior Double, non-smoking, city view on the 14th floor. Total rate: ¥89,500 (approximately $600 USD), prepaid and non-refundable. The hotel is a 3-minute walk from Shinjuku-Sanchome subway station with direct access to the Marunouchi and Fukutoshin lines. Complimentary Wi-Fi and breakfast for two guests are included daily.
